title: Razz Berry Hunger Bar
description: Changes the Hunger Bar into Razz Berries from Pokemon (Includes AppleSkin)
body:
### A resource pack that simply changes your hunger bars into razz berries

**Also supports [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) and Feather (the client)**

Check Gallery if you're curious

For 1.8.9 users please layer the resource pack above another resource pack that also has custom bars like hearts, exp bar, any bar you could think of bcuz they use the same spritesheet

This pack can be used in 1.20.2 (whoever still uses that version) and forward
